content.text:
Contoso offers a product called the Contoso Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses, which falls under the smart eyewear category. Key features of these smart glasses include:

- Augmented Reality (AR) interface
- Voice-controlled AI agent
- HD video recording with 3D audio
- UV protection and blue light filtering
- Wireless charging with extended battery life

The product also comes with a two-year limited warranty on electronic components and a 30-day return policy with no questions asked.
